symptom_pattern: confusion, fainting, severe weakness, repeated vomiting, or very high/low sugar reading
action: Tell the user to seek urgent medical help or contact their clinician/emergency service based on severity and local availability.
escalation_text: This may be unsafe for self-care. Please get medical help now, especially if symptoms are severe or worsening.
contraindications: Do not adjust insulin or diabetes medicine dose inside the app.

symptom_pattern: chest pain, weakness on one side, severe headache, confusion, breathlessness, fainting
action: Advise emergency medical care immediately. Do not continue routine coaching.
escalation_text: These symptoms can be serious. Please call local emergency services or go to emergency care now.

symptom_pattern: chest pain, fainting, severe breathlessness, new neurological symptoms during exercise
action: Stop exercise and seek emergency medical care if symptoms are severe or sudden.
escalation_text: Stop activity now and get urgent help if symptoms are severe, sudden, or not improving.
contraindications: Do not advise pushing through symptoms.
